scope: lib/xlsx-builder.ts buildEducationRecordStructuredXlsx and generic workpack builder behavior

forms.evidence: AI prompt returns educationRecordStructured, parser validates an object, and XLSX builder maps structured fields directly.
Permit draft is text parsed into rows and exported via layout=permit without a dedicated structured schema.
Free-form AI prompt returns emergencyResponseDraft as a string; XLSX export uses generic rows.
Drafts are strings parsed into rows and exported through generic/profile layouts.

remainingGaps: Permit and inspection forms still need a dedicated structured type, prompt, parser, route mode, and XLSX builder.
Emergency response still needs a structured schema for stop triggers, response steps, contacts, evacuation, first aid, preservation, and recurrence prevention.
Parallel changes appeared in lib/xlsx-builder.ts near workPlan code and should be reviewed before staging a combined commit.
